compiled_state.title: Add RED structural tests for --auto flag to test-architect-foundation-skill.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add 3 new RED structural boundary test functions to tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh for the --auto flag story.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh (add 3 test functions + update header count)
- .test-index (append 3 RED marker lines)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: RED
New tests will FAIL until d51a-5b1c Task 2 adds the --auto Mode section to SKILL.md.
TDD exemption: structural boundary tests (Rule 5 — non-executable LLM instruction file).

## Tests to Add (insert before print_summary)

test_auto_flag_support: grep -qiE '--auto' SKILL.md
test_auto_recommended_defaults: grep -qiE 'recommend.*default' SKILL.md
test_auto_graceful_missing: grep -qiE 'actionable.*error' SKILL.md

## Header Update
Run: count=$(grep -c '^test_.*().*{' tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh)
Update the 'Validates (N named assertions)' header line to reflect the new count.

## .test-index Entries to Append (standalone RED markers)
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_flag_support]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_recommended_defaults]
plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh [test_auto_graceful_missing]

## Verification
Run bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh — the 3 new tests must FAIL, all previous tests must PASS.
